title: Teleport Back To Death
description: /back command to teleport you back to your death location after you die. 1.21.x
body:
This is a plugin to teleport you back to your death location through /back. 
Compatible for 1.21 to 1.21.10. Hasn't been tested on other versions.
It works on all dimension, it removes the last saved location after you use it so it can't be used again until you die again. Discord: fbikitty. You can dm for support, suggestions, or any plugins you may want me to make.
